diagrams.title: DFA for strings ending with 'ab'
diagrams.description: A 3-state DFA that accepts all strings over {a,b} ending with 'ab'
elements: Transitions: q0-a→q1, q0-b→q0, q1-a→q1, q1-b→q2, q2-a→q1, q2-b→q2
Trap state transitions on invalid patterns
diagrams.purpose: Understanding DFA construction for pattern matching

diagrams.title: NFA to DFA Subset Construction
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how subsets of NFA states become DFA states
elements: Right side: Equivalent DFA states labeled as {q0}, {q0,q1}, etc.
diagrams.purpose: Understanding conversion algorithm from NFA to DFA

diagrams.title: Thompson's Construction Templates
diagrams.description: Three basic NFA patterns used in Thompson's Construction for RE
elements: Union pattern: two parallel paths with ε-transitions
Concatenation pattern: series connection of two NFAs
Star pattern: loop with ε-transitions back to start
Each template shows start and accepting states
diagrams.purpose: Building NFA from regular expression visually

diagrams.title: DFA Minimization Table-Filling Method
diagrams.description: Method to find equivalent states in DFA for minimization
elements: Initial partition: accepting vs non-accepting states

visuals.title: Finite Automata And Regular Expressions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for finite automata and regular expressions
